raw_consumer_statement:
1. credit card was stolen or lost, and about hundreds charges about {$7300.00} from XXXX to XX/XX/XXXX was charged in my American express XXXX. 
2. Card was barely used by us and we set up monthly automatic payment so I didn't find out card was lost or stolen until XX/XX/XXXX. 
3. XX/XX/XXXX, once we found those unauthorized charges, we immediately notify Amex, we were told no worries, Amex will refund us. 
4.Amex disputed some charges successfully within 1 week and the balance was about {$4600.00} after that, but no update after 3-5 months 5.We filed a policy report in policy department on XX/XX/XXXX, and detective took the bank statement for investigation, she checked many stores where card was used, and in the videos, neither me nor family member was there and she was able to find the same suspect. Report is attached 6.three months after we notified AMex, XX/XX/XXXX, card was charged late fee {$39.00} and interest fee {$110.00}, contact Amex, no resolution and no notification about the result of fraud case, one time chatting and call, was told case still open. To avoid further charges and interest we paid off the balance and other fees etc. 
6.Someday XX/XX/XXXX, finally one rep let us know case was rejected and we found an email XX/XX/XXXX in spam email saying case was rejected " According to documented company records, you advised us that the true Card Member is using the Card. This action is not considered fraud so we are closing this case. ", which the reason is not true. We didn't advise that and Policy report can prove it. 
7.We requested reopen the case, and XX/XX/XXXX Amex asked for charge details and statements in a mail letter, and we received the letter, and submitted the document successfully. 
8.XXXX XXXX XXXX, we missed a call from Amex, we thought it was fraud initially, but we called back, nobody answered. 
9. There was some credits showing in the card, total about {$1300.00} 10.XXXX XXXX XXXX, we contacted Amex via chat, and rep told us case was rejected again because we failed to answer questions which was sent vial email to another email address, which was not true after I confirmed with AMEX fraud team via call after that. 
10.We contacted Amex MANY times vial call and chat past 6 months, and was told wrong information, and amex is not protecting credit card holder also not efficient on dealing with dispute charges. also charge late fee and interest when the case was not closed nor notify us the status.
